title: falcaria falcaria
intro: Falcaria falcaria, also known as angelica or false angelica, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Falcaria falcaria is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
